non_final.description: Upload a ZIP containing generated adversarial PNG images and manifest.json. The ZIP must contain adversarial_images/<case_id>.png for every case in the phase input metadata.

final.description: Upload a ZIP containing infer.py plus checkpoint/config files. The platform runs infer.py against the phase inputs asset to generate adversarial_images/ before judging.

evaluation.description: BTC uploads ground_truth.json as asset key ground_truth and inputs.zip as asset key inputs for each public/private evaluation set. inputs.zip contains real PNG images plus metadata.json; judge.py and infer.py only depend on the asset keys, not on the original filenames.

task_assets.description: BTC upload the shared task-level judge.py once. Public/private and normal/final phases all use this judge.
